Implements a time selection window with configuration and update functions for a Pebble firmware application.

# Purpose
The code defines a module for managing a time selection window in a user interface. It provides functionality to configure and display a window where users can select a time, with options for different content sizes and styles. The module includes structures and functions to handle the layout and appearance of the time selection components, such as the selection layer, label, and range text layers. It uses configuration structures to adjust the size and positioning of these components based on the preferred content size and runtime platform.

The module includes several static functions to manage the internal logic of the time selection window, such as [`prv_selection_config`](<#prv_selection_config>), which determines the appropriate size configuration, and [`prv_update_layer_placement`](<#prv_update_layer_placement>), which updates the placement of various UI layers. Public functions like [`time_selection_window_init`](<#time_selection_window_init>) and [`time_selection_window_configure`](<#time_selection_window_configure>) are provided to initialize and configure the time selection window with specific settings, including the current time, label text, and callback functions. The module also handles user interactions through callbacks for incrementing, decrementing, and completing the time selection process.
# Imports and Dependencies

---
- `time_selection_window.h`
- `applib/ui/option_menu_window.h`
- `services/common/clock.h`
- `shell/system_theme.h`
- `stdio.h`


# Global Variables

---
### s\_time\_selection\_config\_medium
- **Type**: ``TimeSelectionSizeConfig``
- **Description**: Defines the configuration for medium-sized time selection UI elements. It specifies font, cell dimensions, padding, and layout offsets for the time selection interface.
- **Use**: Used to configure the appearance and layout of medium-sized time selection components in the UI.


---
### s\_time\_selection\_config\_large
- **Type**: ``TimeSelectionSizeConfig``
- **Description**: Defines the configuration for a large time selection interface. It includes font settings, cell dimensions, and layout offsets for the interface.
- **Use**: Used to configure the appearance and layout of a large time selection window.


---
### s\_time\_selection\_configs
- **Type**: ``TimeSelectionSizeConfig *[NumPreferredContentSizes]``
- **Description**: An array of pointers to `TimeSelectionSizeConfig` structures, each representing configuration settings for different preferred content sizes. The array maps specific content size preferences to their corresponding configuration structures, such as `s_time_selection_config_medium` and `s_time_selection_config_large`. This setup allows the program to select the appropriate configuration based on the preferred content size.
- **Use**: Used to store and access configuration settings for different preferred content sizes in a time selection window.


# Data Structures

---
### TimeSelectionSizeConfig
- **Type**: ``struct``
- **Members**:
    - ``subtitle_font_key``: A pointer to a constant character string that specifies the font key for the subtitle.
    - ``cell_width``: An integer that specifies the width of a cell.
    - ``ampm_cell_width``: An integer that specifies the width of the AM/PM cell.
    - ``cell_padding``: An integer that specifies the padding between cells.
    - ``top_offset_with_label``: An integer that specifies the top offset when a label is present.
    - ``top_offset_without_label``: An integer that specifies the top offset when no label is present.
    - ``label_origin_y``: An integer that specifies the Y-coordinate origin of the label.
    - ``range_origin_y``: An integer that specifies the Y-coordinate origin of the range.
- **Description**: Defines the configuration for the size and layout of time selection elements, including font, cell dimensions, padding, and positional offsets for labels and ranges.


# Functions

---
### prv\_selection\_config<!-- {{#callable:prv_selection_config}} -->
[View Source →](<../../../../../../src/fw/applib/ui/time_selection_window.c#L73>)

Returns a pointer to the `TimeSelectionSizeConfig` based on the default content size for the runtime platform.
- **Inputs**: None
- **Logic and Control Flow**:
    - Calls `system_theme_get_default_content_size_for_runtime_platform()` to get the default content size for the runtime platform.
    - Uses the returned `PreferredContentSize` to index into the `s_time_selection_configs` array.
    - Returns the `TimeSelectionSizeConfig` pointer corresponding to the default content size.
- **Output**: A pointer to a `TimeSelectionSizeConfig` structure.


---
### prv\_cell\_width<!-- {{#callable:prv_cell_width}} -->
[View Source →](<../../../../../../src/fw/applib/ui/time_selection_window.c#L79>)

Determines the width of a cell based on the index and number of cells, considering 24-hour clock style.
- **Inputs**:
    - ``i``: The index of the current cell.
    - ``num_cells``: The total number of cells.
- **Logic and Control Flow**:
    - Retrieve the current time selection configuration using `prv_selection_config()`.
    - Check if the clock is not in 24-hour style and if the current cell is the last cell (`i == num_cells - 1`).
    - If both conditions are true, return the `ampm_cell_width` from the configuration.
    - Otherwise, return the `cell_width` from the configuration.
- **Output**: Returns the width of the cell as an integer.
- **Functions Called**:
    - [`prv_selection_config`](<#prv_selection_config>)


---
### prv\_update\_selection\_layer<!-- {{#callable:prv_update_selection_layer}} -->
[View Source →](<../../../../../../src/fw/applib/ui/time_selection_window.c#L88>)

Updates the position of the selection layer within the time selection window based on the presence of a label.
- **Inputs**:
    - ``time_selection_window``: A pointer to a `TimeSelectionWindowData` structure that contains the selection layer and label information.
- **Logic and Control Flow**:
    - Retrieve the current selection size configuration using `prv_selection_config()`.
    - Determine the `top_offset` based on whether the `label_text_layer.text` is present in `time_selection_window`.
    - If `label_text_layer.text` is present, use `config->top_offset_with_label`; otherwise, use `config->top_offset_without_label`.
    - Set the frame of the `selection_layer.layer` using `layer_set_frame()`, with the calculated `top_offset` and the width from `time_selection_window->window.layer.bounds.size.w`.
- **Output**: None (the function modifies the `selection_layer.layer` frame in the `time_selection_window` structure).
- **Functions Called**:
    - [`prv_selection_config`](<#prv_selection_config>)
    - [`layer_set_frame`](<layer.c.md#layer_set_frame>)
    - [`GRect`](<../graphics/gtypes.h.md#GRect>)
    - [`selection_layer_default_cell_height`](<selection_layer.c.md#selection_layer_default_cell_height>)


---
### prv\_vertical\_align\_text\_layer<!-- {{#callable:prv_vertical_align_text_layer}} -->
[View Source →](<../../../../../../src/fw/applib/ui/time_selection_window.c#L97>)

Vertically aligns a `TextLayer` within a `TimeSelectionWindowData` structure based on specified parameters.
- **Inputs**:
    - ``time_selection_window``: A pointer to a `TimeSelectionWindowData` structure that contains the window and layer information.
    - ``text_layer``: A pointer to a `TextLayer` that needs vertical alignment.
    - ``origin_y``: An integer specifying the initial y-coordinate for the text layer's frame.
    - ``lines``: An integer representing the number of lines to consider for vertical centering.
    - ``extra_line_offset_y``: An integer for additional y-offset to adjust the vertical position.
- **Logic and Control Flow**:
    - Calculate the line height using the font of the `text_layer`.
    - Create a [`GRect`](<../graphics/gtypes.h.md#GRect>) frame for the `text_layer` with a height accommodating `lines + 1` lines and an additional half line for descenders.
    - Set the frame of the `text_layer` using [`layer_set_frame`](<layer.c.md#layer_set_frame>).
    - If the platform is round, enable screen text flow and paging with an inset of 4.
    - Get the content size of the `text_layer` using [`app_text_layer_get_content_size`](<text_layer.c.md#app_text_layer_get_content_size>).
    - If the content height exceeds the calculated line height, adjust the y-origin of the frame by subtracting half the line height and adding `extra_line_offset_y`.
    - Update the frame of the `text_layer` with the new y-origin.
- **Output**: The function does not return a value; it modifies the frame of the `text_layer` to achieve vertical alignment.
- **Functions Called**:
    - [`GRect`](<../graphics/gtypes.h.md#GRect>)
    - [`layer_set_frame`](<layer.c.md#layer_set_frame>)
    - [`text_layer_enable_screen_text_flow_and_paging`](<text_layer.c.md#text_layer_enable_screen_text_flow_and_paging>)
    - [`app_text_layer_get_content_size`](<text_layer.c.md#app_text_layer_get_content_size>)


---
### prv\_update\_label\_text\_layer<!-- {{#callable:prv_update_label_text_layer}} -->
[View Source →](<../../../../../../src/fw/applib/ui/time_selection_window.c#L117>)

Aligns the label text layer vertically within the time selection window if the text is present.
- **Inputs**:
    - ``time_selection_window``: A pointer to a `TimeSelectionWindowData` structure that contains the label text layer to update.
- **Logic and Control Flow**:
    - Get the `label_text_layer` from the `time_selection_window`.
    - Check if the `label_text_layer` has text.
    - If text is present, get the `label_origin_y` from the current selection configuration.
    - Set `lines` to 1 and `extra_line_offset_y` to 0.
    - Call [`prv_vertical_align_text_layer`](<#prv_vertical_align_text_layer>) to align the `label_text_layer` vertically using the calculated parameters.
- **Output**: No return value; the function updates the position of the label text layer within the `time_selection_window`.
- **Functions Called**:
    - [`prv_selection_config`](<#prv_selection_config>)
    - [`prv_vertical_align_text_layer`](<#prv_vertical_align_text_layer>)


---
### prv\_update\_range\_text\_layer<!-- {{#callable:prv_update_range_text_layer}} -->
[View Source →](<../../../../../../src/fw/applib/ui/time_selection_window.c#L128>)

Updates the text layers for displaying a time range and its subtitle in a time selection window.
- **Inputs**:
    - ``time_selection_window``: A pointer to a `TimeSelectionWindowData` structure that contains the time data and text layers to update.
- **Logic and Control Flow**:
    - Check if either `range_text_layer` or `range_subtitle_text_layer` is hidden; if so, return immediately.
    - Retrieve the end time (`hour_end` and `minute_end`) from `time_selection_window->time_data`.
    - Calculate the start time by subtracting `range_duration_m` from the end time using `clock_hour_and_minute_add`.
    - Format the start and end times into strings `start_buf` and `end_buf` using `clock_format_time`.
    - Combine the formatted start and end times into a single string and store it in `range_buf`.
    - Set the text of `range_text_layer` to the combined time range string.
    - Copy `range_text` from `time_selection_window` into `range_subtitle_buf` and set it as the text for `range_subtitle_text_layer`.
    - Determine the top and bottom text layers based on the display shape using `PBL_IF_RECT_ELSE`.
    - Align the top text layer vertically using [`prv_vertical_align_text_layer`](<#prv_vertical_align_text_layer>) with `range_origin_y` and `extra_line_offset_y`.
    - Get the content size of the top text layer and calculate the bottom layer's origin y-coordinate.
    - Align the bottom text layer vertically using [`prv_vertical_align_text_layer`](<#prv_vertical_align_text_layer>) with the calculated y-coordinate and `extra_line_offset_y`.
- **Output**: None (the function updates the text layers in the `time_selection_window` structure).
- **Functions Called**:
    - [`text_layer_set_text`](<text_layer.c.md#text_layer_set_text>)
    - [`prv_selection_config`](<#prv_selection_config>)
    - [`prv_vertical_align_text_layer`](<#prv_vertical_align_text_layer>)
    - [`app_text_layer_get_content_size`](<text_layer.c.md#app_text_layer_get_content_size>)


---
### prv\_update\_layer\_placement<!-- {{#callable:prv_update_layer_placement}} -->
[View Source →](<../../../../../../src/fw/applib/ui/time_selection_window.c#L173>)

Updates the placement of various layers in a `TimeSelectionWindowData` structure.
- **Inputs**:
    - ``time_selection_window``: A pointer to a `TimeSelectionWindowData` structure that contains the layers to update.
- **Logic and Control Flow**:
    - Calls [`prv_update_selection_layer`](<#prv_update_selection_layer>) with `time_selection_window` to update the selection layer's frame based on the label's presence.
    - Calls [`prv_update_label_text_layer`](<#prv_update_label_text_layer>) with `time_selection_window` to adjust the label text layer's vertical alignment if it contains text.
    - Calls [`prv_update_range_text_layer`](<#prv_update_range_text_layer>) with `time_selection_window` to update the range text and subtitle layers, including their text content and vertical alignment.
- **Output**: None (void function).
- **Functions Called**:
    - [`prv_update_selection_layer`](<#prv_update_selection_layer>)
    - [`prv_update_label_text_layer`](<#prv_update_label_text_layer>)
    - [`prv_update_range_text_layer`](<#prv_update_range_text_layer>)

### prv\_handle\_from\_get\_text<!-- {{#callable:prv_handle_from_get_text}} -->
[View Source →](<../../../../../../src/fw/applib/ui/time_selection_window.c#L180>)

Retrieves a text representation of a date-time selection based on the given index and context.
- **Inputs**:
    - ``index``: An unsigned integer representing the index of the date-time selection to retrieve.
    - ``context``: A pointer to `TimeSelectionWindowData`, which contains the date-time data and buffer for text retrieval.
- **Logic and Control Flow**:
    - Cast the `context` pointer to a `TimeSelectionWindowData` pointer and store it in `data`.
    - Call [`date_time_selection_get_text`](<date_time_selection_window_private.c.md#date_time_selection_get_text>) with `data->time_data`, `index`, and `data->cell_buf` to get the text representation of the date-time selection.
    - Return the result of [`date_time_selection_get_text`](<date_time_selection_window_private.c.md#date_time_selection_get_text>).
- **Output**: A pointer to a character string representing the text of the date-time selection.
- **Functions Called**:
    - [`date_time_selection_get_text`](<date_time_selection_window_private.c.md#date_time_selection_get_text>)

[View Source →](<../../../../../../src/fw/applib/ui/time_selection_window.c#L186>)

- **Inputs**:
    - `context`: A pointer to `TimeSelectionWindowData`, which contains the `complete_callback` and `callback_context`.
- **Logic and Control Flow**:
    - Cast the `context` to `TimeSelectionWindowData` type and store it in `data`.
    - Call the `complete_callback` function from `data`, passing `data` and `data->callback_context` as arguments.

### prv\_handle\_inc<!-- {{#callable:prv_handle_inc}} -->
[View Source →](<../../../../../../src/fw/applib/ui/time_selection_window.c#L191>)

Increments the time data at a specified index and updates the range text layer.
- **Inputs**:
    - ``index``: The index of the time data to increment.
    - ``context``: A pointer to `TimeSelectionWindowData`, which contains the time data and other related information.
- **Logic and Control Flow**:
    - Cast `context` to `TimeSelectionWindowData` pointer and store it in `data`.
    - Call [`date_time_handle_time_change`](<date_time_selection_window_private.c.md#date_time_handle_time_change>) with `data->time_data`, `index`, and `1` to increment the time data at the specified index.
    - Call [`prv_update_range_text_layer`](<#prv_update_range_text_layer>) with `data` to update the range text layer.
- **Output**: No return value.
- **Functions Called**:
    - [`date_time_handle_time_change`](<date_time_selection_window_private.c.md#date_time_handle_time_change>)
    - [`prv_update_range_text_layer`](<#prv_update_range_text_layer>)

### prv\_handle\_dec<!-- {{#callable:prv_handle_dec}} -->
[View Source →](<../../../../../../src/fw/applib/ui/time_selection_window.c#L197>)

Decrements the time value at a specified index and updates the range text layer.
- **Inputs**:
    - ``index``: The index of the time component to decrement.
    - ``context``: A pointer to `TimeSelectionWindowData`, which contains the time data and other related information.
- **Logic and Control Flow**:
    - Retrieve the `TimeSelectionWindowData` from the `context` pointer.
    - Call [`date_time_handle_time_change`](<date_time_selection_window_private.c.md#date_time_handle_time_change>) with the `time_data`, `index`, and `-1` to decrement the time value at the specified index.
    - Call [`prv_update_range_text_layer`](<#prv_update_range_text_layer>) to refresh the display of the range text layer with the updated time data.
- **Output**: No return value.
- **Functions Called**:

    - [`prv_update_range_text_layer`](<#prv_update_range_text_layer>)

### time\_selection\_window\_set\_to\_current\_time<!-- {{#callable:time_selection_window_set_to_current_time}} -->
[View Source →](<../../../../../../src/fw/applib/ui/time_selection_window.c#L204>)

Sets the time in a `TimeSelectionWindowData` structure to the current system time.
- **Inputs**:
    - ``time_selection_window``: A pointer to a `TimeSelectionWindowData` structure where the current time will be set.
- **Logic and Control Flow**:
    - Declare a `struct tm` variable named `current_time` to hold the current time.
    - Call `clock_get_time_tm` to populate `current_time` with the current system time.
    - Assign the `tm_hour` field of `current_time` to the `hour` field of `time_selection_window->time_data`.
    - Assign the `tm_min` field of `current_time` to the `minute` field of `time_selection_window->time_data`.
- **Output**: No return value; the function modifies the `time_selection_window` structure in place.

### time\_selection\_window\_configure<!-- {{#callable:time_selection_window_configure}} -->
[View Source →](<../../../../../../src/fw/applib/ui/time_selection_window.c#L211>)

Configures a `TimeSelectionWindowData` structure using the provided `TimeSelectionWindowConfig` settings.
- **Inputs**:
    - ``time_selection_window``: A pointer to a `TimeSelectionWindowData` structure that will be configured.
    - ``config``: A pointer to a `TimeSelectionWindowConfig` structure containing configuration settings.
- **Logic and Control Flow**:
    - Sets the text of the `label_text_layer` in `time_selection_window` using `config->label`.
    - Checks if `config->color.a` is non-zero and sets the active background color of the `selection_layer` in `time_selection_window` to `config->color`.
    - If `config->range.update` is true, updates `range_text`, `range_duration_m`, and visibility of `range_text_layer` and `range_subtitle_text_layer` based on `config->range` settings.
    - If `config->callback.update` is true, updates `complete_callback` and `callback_context` in `time_selection_window` with `config->callback` settings.
    - Calls [`prv_update_layer_placement`](<#prv_update_layer_placement>) to update the layout of the layers in `time_selection_window`.
- **Output**: No return value; the function modifies the `time_selection_window` structure in place.
- **Functions Called**:
    - [`text_layer_set_text`](<text_layer.c.md#text_layer_set_text>)
    - [`selection_layer_set_active_bg_color`](<selection_layer.c.md#selection_layer_set_active_bg_color>)
    - [`layer_set_hidden`](<layer.c.md#layer_set_hidden>)
    - [`prv_update_layer_placement`](<#prv_update_layer_placement>)


---
### prv\_text\_layer\_init<!-- {{#callable:prv_text_layer_init}} -->
[View Source →](<../../../../../../src/fw/applib/ui/time_selection_window.c#L231>)

Initializes a `TextLayer` with specified parameters and adds it to a parent `Layer`.
- **Inputs**:
    - ``window_layer``: A pointer to the parent `Layer` where the `TextLayer` will be added.
    - ``text_layer``: A pointer to the `TextLayer` to initialize.
    - ``font``: The `GFont` to use for the `TextLayer`.
- **Logic and Control Flow**:
    - Calls [`text_layer_init_with_parameters`](<text_layer.c.md#text_layer_init_with_parameters>) to initialize the `text_layer` with default parameters including position, font, text color, background color, text alignment, and overflow mode.
    - Adds the initialized `text_layer` to the `window_layer` as a child layer using `layer_add_child`.
    - Sets the `text_layer` to be hidden initially using [`layer_set_hidden`](<layer.c.md#layer_set_hidden>).
- **Output**: No return value; the function modifies the `text_layer` and `window_layer` directly.
- **Functions Called**:
    - [`text_layer_init_with_parameters`](<text_layer.c.md#text_layer_init_with_parameters>)
    - [`layer_set_hidden`](<layer.c.md#layer_set_hidden>)

### time\_selection\_window\_init<!-- {{#callable:time_selection_window_init}} -->
[View Source →](<../../../../../../src/fw/applib/ui/time_selection_window.c#L238>)

Initializes a time selection window with specified configuration settings.
- **Inputs**:
    - ``time_selection_window``: A pointer to `TimeSelectionWindowData` structure that will be initialized.
    - ``config``: A pointer to `TimeSelectionWindowConfig` structure containing configuration settings for the window.
- **Logic and Control Flow**:
    - Initialize the `time_selection_window` structure to default values.
    - Set up the general window properties, including its name and user data.
    - Determine the number of cells in the selection layer based on 24-hour or 12-hour clock style.
    - Initialize the selection layer with calculated cell widths and padding.
    - Set inactive background color and click configuration for the selection layer.
    - Assign callback functions for selection layer events such as text retrieval, completion, increment, and decrement.
    - Add the selection layer to the window's layer hierarchy.
    - Initialize and configure the label text layer with a header font and make it visible.
    - Initialize the range text layer and range subtitle text layer with appropriate fonts.
    - Initialize the status bar layer with specified colors and separator mode, then add it to the window's layer hierarchy.
    - Call [`time_selection_window_configure`](<#time_selection_window_configure>) to apply additional configuration settings.
- **Output**: No return value; the function modifies the `time_selection_window` structure in place.
- **Functions Called**:
    - [`window_init`](<window.c.md#window_init>)
    - [`window_set_user_data`](<window.c.md#window_set_user_data>)
    - [`prv_selection_config`](<#prv_selection_config>)
    - [`selection_layer_init`](<selection_layer.c.md#selection_layer_init>)
    - [`prv_cell_width`](<#prv_cell_width>)
    - [`selection_layer_set_cell_width`](<selection_layer.c.md#selection_layer_set_cell_width>)
    - [`selection_layer_set_cell_padding`](<selection_layer.c.md#selection_layer_set_cell_padding>)
    - [`selection_layer_set_inactive_bg_color`](<selection_layer.c.md#selection_layer_set_inactive_bg_color>)
    - [`selection_layer_set_click_config_onto_window`](<selection_layer.c.md#selection_layer_set_click_config_onto_window>)
    - [`selection_layer_set_callbacks`](<selection_layer.c.md#selection_layer_set_callbacks>)
    - [`prv_text_layer_init`](<#prv_text_layer_init>)
    - [`layer_set_hidden`](<layer.c.md#layer_set_hidden>)
    - [`time_selection_window_configure`](<#time_selection_window_configure>)

### time\_selection\_window\_deinit<!-- {{#callable:time_selection_window_deinit}} -->
[View Source →](<../../../../../../src/fw/applib/ui/time_selection_window.c#L300>)

Deinitializes the components of a `TimeSelectionWindowData` structure if it is not null.
- **Inputs**:
    - ``time_selection_window``: A pointer to a `TimeSelectionWindowData` structure that contains the status and selection layers to deinitialize.
- **Logic and Control Flow**:
    - Check if `time_selection_window` is not null.
    - Call `status_bar_layer_deinit` to deinitialize the `status_layer` of `time_selection_window`.
    - Call [`selection_layer_deinit`](<selection_layer.c.md#selection_layer_deinit>) to deinitialize the `selection_layer` of `time_selection_window`.
- **Output**: No return value.
- **Functions Called**:
    - [`selection_layer_deinit`](<selection_layer.c.md#selection_layer_deinit>)
